creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
Looking at an earlier bug report 258827, I checked the file system permissions.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=258827

root@ca:~ # ls -la /usr/local/etc/step
total 10
drwxr-xr-x   3 step step   4  8 Nov 16:51 .
drwxr-xr-x  13 root wheel 28  8 Nov 16:49 ..
drw-------   7 step step   7  8 Nov 16:51 ca
-rw-------   1 step step  33  8 Nov 16:52 password.txt
root@ca:~ #
